priceUpdate: SOL is +4.4% in the last 24h and +3.3% over the last 7 days, while sentiment is still extreme fear. That keeps the setup tradable, but not stable yet. 24h volume is about $3.84B, which shows active trading. The key question is whether buyers keep rotating into Solana instead of back into BTC and ETH. Near-term direction depends on whether AI agents headlines turn into real usage (wallets, swaps, borrowing), led by Solana tops DApp revenue! Is efficient monetization driving.
thisWeek: The lead setup this week is Solana tops DApp revenue! Is efficient monetization driving institutional interest, with traders now reacting to specific Solana headlines. Next up is Tokenized xStocks surpass $25 billion in total transaction volume. These stories only matter if they drive measurable usage, borrowing, and trading depth. Watch wallet growth, swaps, and perps depth around AI agents first.
nextWeek: Into next week, keep Tokenized xStocks surpass $25 billion in total transaction volume on watch because it can pull incremental institutional and trading flow into the Solana complex. If that flow broadens beyond one headline, trend quality usually improves. If not, expect rotation and chop instead of continuation.
whatsHot: What's hot: ai agents are getting the highest share of Solana headlines right now.
